title: Duties & Roles faculty (statutory duties/oath/powers, source-cited)
context: The Duties & Roles faculty is one of the two core HIGH-tier faculties. It surfaces an office's statutory duties, oath, and powers -- always source-cited, always behind the guardrail layer. Every claim must carry a Source; a citation-coverage test enforces this. The faculty refuses out-of-scope framings (campaign/optics) and labels all output informational, not legal advice. It is mounted behind the guardrail layer from task 003 and uses the office-memory retrieval from task 006.
objective: Implement the Duties & Roles faculty mounted behind the guardrail layer, returning only source-cited structured output of duties, oath, and powers; passing the citation-coverage test; refusing out-of-scope framings; and labeled informational not legal advice.
acceptanceCriteria: Faculty is mounted behind the guardrail layer (task 003); refused-category requests never reach it
Returns structured output of duties, oath, and powers for the office; every claim carries an attached Source citation (citation-coverage test passes)
Uses Imprint office-memory retrieval (task 006) for grounded, cited context
Refuses out-of-scope framings (campaign/optics/electioneering); refusals include a lawful-alternative pointer
All output labeled informational, not legal advice
Expert (ethics/legal) sign-off required before any real jurisdiction content is enabled through this faculty
CI green including red-team assertions on this faculty surface
output: A merged PR implementing the Duties & Roles faculty behind the guardrail layer, with source-cited structured output, citation-coverage enforcement, out-of-scope refusals, and informational labeling.
